summary.lv: IT Camp partneris (fintech maksājumu apstrādes uzņēmums ar 20+ gadu pieredzi) meklē CTO, kas vadīs tehnoloģisko stratēģiju, arhitektūru un komandu starptautiskā mērogā.
summary.en: An IT Camp partner (a fintech specialising in payment processing with 20+ years of experience) is hiring a CTO to lead technology strategy, architecture and the team internationally.
